close_channel.name: close_channel
close_channel.description: Applies a channel closing action to the current channel.

action.description: Select the closing action you want to apply

add_to_channel.name: add_to_channel
add_to_channel.description: Adds roles to the current channel using a filtered selector.

create_match_channel.name: match_channel
create_match_channel.description: Creates a match channel for a specific matchday entry.

categoria.description: Division where the channel will be created

sync.invalid_usage: Use `!sync guild`, `!sync global`, `!sync prune guild`, `!sync prune global`, or `!sync prune other`.
sync.scope_locked: The bot is configured with `BOT_SYNC_SCOPE={sync_scope}`. Change `.env` and restart if you want to use the other scope.

slash_status.result: Local slash command state: guild_id={guild_id} commands=[{commands}]

channel_management.delete_prompt:
You are about to permanently delete `{channel_name}`.
Protected system roles: {protected_roles}.
Confirm only if you are completely sure.

channel_role_addition.no_results_placeholder: There are no roles to display
channel_role_addition.render_content:
Select the roles you want to add to this channel.
Filtered range: `{range_start}` < roles < `{range_end}`.
Page {page}/{page_count} | Selected: {selected_count} | Available: {visible_count}/{candidate_count}.
Search: {search_query}.
Use Confirm to apply the channel permissions.
channel_role_addition.only_actor: Only the user who ran the command can use this selector.
channel_role_addition.timeout: Role selection expired. No changes were applied.
channel_role_addition.select_before_confirm: Select at least one role before confirming.

channel_delete_confirmation.only_actor: Only the user who ran the command can confirm this action.
channel_delete_confirmation.timeout: Confirmation expired. The channel was not deleted.

channel_management.server_only: This command can only be used inside a server.
channel_management.text_only: This command can only be used inside a text channel.
channel_management.invalid_channel_name: This command can only be used in channels named like `『𝗝』1️⃣『𝗣』4️⃣・⚽`, `『𝗝』1️⃣『𝗣』4️⃣・✅`, or `『𝗝』1️⃣『𝗣』4️⃣・🔒`.
channel_management.unauthorized_role: Only these roles can use this command: {protected_roles}.
channel_management.protected_roles_missing: Protected roles are missing from the server: {missing_roles}.
channel_management.invalid_role_not_in_guild: The role `{role_name}` does not belong to this server.
channel_management.invalid_role_everyone: You cannot add `@everyone` to the channel.
channel_management.no_valid_additional_roles: Select at least one valid additional role.
channel_management.range_start_missing: The configured selector start role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
channel_management.range_end_missing: The configured selector end role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
channel_management.range_empty: There are no selectable roles between the configured separators.

match_channel_creation.same_team_roles: You cannot create a match using the same role twice: `{role_name}`.
match_channel_creation.invalid_team_role: The role `{role_name}` cannot be used as a team role for a match channel.
match_channel_creation.team_role_out_of_range: The role `{role_name}` is not inside the configured team role range: `{range_start}` < role < `{range_end}`.
match_channel_creation.channel_already_exists: A channel for that matchday and match already exists: `{channel_name}`.
match_channel_creation.category_missing: The configured category for this channel does not exist: `{category_id}`.

slash.forbidden: You do not have permission to run this command.
slash.bot_missing_permissions: The bot needs enough permissions to manage the channel.
slash.discord_forbidden: Discord rejected the action. Check the bot permissions.
slash.http_error: Discord returned an error while updating the channel.
slash.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while processing the command.

channel_management.match_played_summary: The channel is now read-only for the rest of the roles. Staff, Administrador, and Ceo keep write access.
channel_management.matchday_closed_summary: The channel is now closed for unprotected roles. Only Staff, Administrador, and Ceo keep access.
channel_management.reopen_summary: The channel has been reopened. Write access was restored for the roles that already had access.
channel_management.reopen_with_roles_summary: The channel has been reopened. Write access was restored for the roles that already had access and these roles were added: {roles}.
channel_management.add_roles_summary: These roles were added to the channel: {roles}.

match_channel_creation.created_summary: Created {channel} in `{category}` for matchday {jornada}, match {partido}, between {team_one} and {team_two}.
